description: Small transparent benchmark set for candidate-link ranking. Labels are deliberately hand-curated and should be expanded before publication.

positive.rationale: Predictive coding offers a natural bridge to theories of consciousness.
Self-referential network research is relevant to models of consciousness.
Causality and information-theoretic structure often travel together conceptually.
Narrative and music are closely linked forms of temporal, affective structure.
Collective and historical memory shape grief and memorialisation.
Loneliness and trust belong in a shared social-cohesion research neighborhood.
Crime and harm are tightly linked in social-risk and pathway analyses.
Pattern recognition and conceptual metaphor share abstraction machinery.
Death and impermanence are tightly coupled existential concepts.
Purpose and meaning are an intuitive high-value candidate bridge.
Symbiosis and interconnection are close systems-level concepts.
Theory of mind and empathy/compassion are adjacent social-cognition concepts.

negative.rationale: Dark matter and shame are not a meaningful research-candidate bridge in this atlas.
Quantum superposition and trust should rank very low.
The glymphatic system and justice are not a plausible direct candidate edge.
Ritual and dark matter are intentionally unrelated in this benchmark.
Working memory and symbiosis should remain distant.
Fear contagion and the holographic principle are not a useful candidate pair.
Neuroplasticity and the sacred are too indirect for a benchmark-positive pair.
Beauty and coercion should not rank as a useful conceptual bridge.
Dream and law are not expected to be a candidate edge here.
Synaptic pruning and freedom are too weakly coupled for positive ground truth.
Infinity and kindness should be negative in a direct ranking benchmark.
Sleep & memory and exploitation are not a plausible direct candidate edge.
